hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
p = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
custom_skills = ['daybook', 'plan-week', 'process-daybook', 'process-readwise', 'publish-to-sharepoint', 'sync-tasks', 'vault-review', 'daily-brief-archive']
is_custom_skill = any(f'/skills/{s}/' in p for s in custom_skills)
protected = ['.claude/roles/', '.claude/agents/', 'CLAUDE.md', 'AGENTS.md', 'Readwise/']
skills_protected = '.claude/skills/' in p and not is_custom_skill
if skills_protected or any(x in p for x in protected):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'deny', 'permissionDecisionReason': 'Framework file — use /update-cog to update.'}}))
"

cd '/Users/darrenarmitage/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/Second Brain' && git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || (git add -A && git commit -m "vault backup: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')")
